title: SKIPPER'S Salmon Meat Sticks Dog Treats - 100% Natural & Gently Air-Dried, Soft & Chewy Sticks for Dogs, Essential Source of Omega 3 Fatty Acids, Great for Skin & Coat | 50g (Pack of 1)
features: 𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐃𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐲 𝐓𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐓𝐢𝐦𝐞: Formulated with 60% salmon and 40% white fish, these salmon dog treats are gently air-dried to lock in natural nutrients. Perfect as dog treat sticks, they’re a tasty and rewarding addition to your dog’s daily routine.

𝐍𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐍𝐮𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐬 & 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐥𝐲 𝐃𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞: Our dog treats natural contain no gluten, wheat, or artificial additives. These dried fish dog treats are gentle on sensitive stomachs while delivering a protein-rich, flavourful snack every dog will enjoy.

𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐚𝐭, 𝐒𝐤𝐢𝐧 & 𝐉𝐨𝐢𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭: These fish treats for dogs are rich in Omega-3 to support joint health, skin vitality, and a shiny coat. Whether you need healthy dog treats for a pup or adult, this snack supports wellness from the inside out.

𝐒𝐨𝐟𝐭 & 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐰𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐁𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐬: Suitable for dogs from 10 weeks old, these puppy chew sticks are ideal for small pups or older dogs. Their soft texture makes them a versatile option among chew sticks for dogs of all sizes and life stages.

𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: We’re committed to providing fish treats for dogs UK that deliver taste and trust in every bite. Our dog natural treats are made with care, ensuring satisfaction for both pet parents and their four-legged companions.

Salmon Meat Sticks Merchant video Why should I choose Skipper's? Skipper's is dedicated to providing high-quality, nutritious, and tasty dog food products that prioritize your dog's health and happiness. We source the finest ingredients, free from fillers and artificial additives. How do Skipper's ensure the safety and quality of products? At Skipper's, safety and quality are paramount. We implement rigorous quality control measures throughout our production process, from sourcing ingredients to packaging. Skipper's products are made with love and your dog's well-being in mind. Are Skipper's products suitable for all dog breeds? Yes, Skipper's products are formulated to be suitable for all dog breeds and sizes, ensuring that every furry friend can enjoy our nutritious and delicious offerings. Are Skipper's treats made with natural ingredients? Absolutely! Skipper's is committed to providing the best for your dog, which is why our treats are made with natural ingredients. We use real fish, carefully selected fruits and vegetables, and avoid artificial additives, colors, and preservatives. What types of fish are used in Skipper's dog treats? Skipper's uses a variety of high-quality fish sources in our treats, including salmon, trout, and whitefish. Each type of fish offers its unique flavor and nutritional benefits, ensuring that your dog gets a diverse range of nutrients. Premium Ingredients Our dog treats are made from the finest, high-quality ingredients. Ensuring that every treat is packed with wholesome goodness for your furry friend. Nutritional Balance These treats are specially formulated to provide a perfect balance of nutrients. Improves Digestion Our treats contain natural fiber sources that aid in digestion. Fiber promotes regular bowel movements and can reduce the risk of constipation. Grain-Free Treats Our Grain-Free Treats are made with the finest natural ingredients, carefully selected to exclude grains. Previous page Next page
